subject: Teaching effectiveness
description: How effective is the teacher in delivering lectures and ensuring student understanding?

subject: Clarity of explanation
description: How clearly does the teacher explain concepts and topics?

subject: Availability for doubts
description: How available is the teacher for resolving student doubts outside of class?

subject: Course organization
description: How well-organized is the course structure, including syllabus and schedule?

subject: Interaction with students
description: How well does the teacher interact with and engage students during class?

subject: Punctuality
description: How punctual is the teacher in attending and conducting classes?

subject: Use of teaching aids
description: How effectively does the teacher use visual aids, slides, and digital tools?

subject: Fairness in grading
description: How fair and transparent is the teacher in evaluating and grading assignments?

subject: Encouraging participation
description: How well does the teacher encourage active participation and discussion?

subject: Knowledge of subject
description: How well-versed is the teacher in the subject matter?

subject: Assignment relevance
description: How relevant and helpful are the assignments given by the teacher?

subject: Feedback quality
description: How constructive and timely is the feedback provided by the teacher?

subject: Practical application
description: How well does the teacher relate theory to practical real-world applications?

subject: Communication skills
description: How effective are the teacher's overall communication skills?

subject: Lab guidance
description: How well does the teacher guide students during practical/lab sessions?

subject: Motivating students
description: How well does the teacher motivate students to learn and achieve their best?

subject: Respect for students
description: How respectful and supportive is the teacher towards students?

subject: Time management
description: How well does the teacher manage class time and cover the syllabus?

subject: Innovation in teaching
description: How innovative are the teaching methods used by the teacher?

subject: Overall satisfaction
description: How satisfied are you overall with this teacher's performance?
